category.scope_note: Electric and cordless hand-held, transportable, and garden power tools exported from China to the Egyptian market through EOS standards adoption and GOEIC import registration and inspection.

title.en: China-to-Egypt Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入埃及：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入埃及：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Egypt market access through EOS standards (ES adopting IEC 62841), GOEIC importer and factory registration and import inspection, NTRA radio approval for cordless tools, electrical safety, EMC, and restricted-substance and battery requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与埃及市场准入对照，涵盖 EOS 标准（ES 采纳 IEC 62841）、GOEIC 进口商与工厂注册及进口检验、无绳工具的 NTRA 无线电批准、电气安全、电磁兼容以及限用物质和电池要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與埃及市場准入對照，涵蓋 EOS 標準（ES 採納 IEC 62841）、GOEIC 進口商與工廠註冊及進口檢驗、無繩工具的 NTRA 無線電批准、電氣安全、電磁相容以及限用物質和電池要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Egyptian law, EOS standards, GOEIC registration and inspection practice, NTRA radio rules, and destination-country enforcement with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行埃及法律、EOS 标准、GOEIC 注册与检验实践、NTRA 无线电规则及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行埃及法律、EOS 標準、GOEIC 註冊與檢驗實務、NTRA 無線電規則及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Egypt, the mandatory baseline is conformity with applicable EOS (Egyptian) standards (many of which adopt IEC 62841), GOEIC importer and foreign-factory registration under the General Organization for Export and Import Control regime and import inspection, NTRA radio approval for cordless tools with radio modules, plus electrical safety, EMC, and restricted-substance and battery handling; an in-country importer of record is required.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入埃及，强制基线是符合适用的 EOS（埃及）标准（其中许多采纳 IEC 62841）、按 GOEIC（进出口监督管理总局）制度完成进口商与境外工厂注册并接受进口检验、对带无线电模块的无绳工具取得 NTRA 无线电批准，并处理电气安全、电磁兼容以及限用物质和电池要求；须有本地进口商作为责任主体。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入埃及，強制基線是符合適用的 EOS（埃及）標準（其中許多採納 IEC 62841）、按 GOEIC（進出口監督管理總局）制度完成進口商與境外工廠註冊並接受進口檢驗、對帶無線電模組的無繩工具取得 NTRA 無線電批准，並處理電氣安全、電磁相容以及限用物質和電池要求；須有本地進口商作為責任主體。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, customs, or primary legal sources are preferred.
